description_long: This object is a small, vividly colored bird with a striking red-orange head and upper body, transitioning to yellowish hues on the lower back and underparts. Its wings and tail are dark gray to black, with subtle lighter feather edges visible along the wings. The beak is short, thick, and conical, pale at the base and darkening toward the tip, ideal for seed eating. The legs and feet are slender and black, with three forward-pointing toes and one backward-pointing toe for perching. The bird's plumage is smooth and well-defined, with a clear gradient between the red, yellow, and dark wing feathers. The overall body shape is compact and streamlined, with a slightly rounded belly and a pointed tail.
description: A small, compact bird with a vivid red-orange head, yellowish underparts, and dark gray-black wings and tail. It has a thick, conical beak and slender black legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's symmetrical red-orange head, pale beak, and black legs directly facing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gradient from red head to yellowish body and the dark, detailed wing and tail feathers.
description_view_2: Top view reveals the symmetrical color pattern, with red-orange central body and dark wings and tail extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same color transitions and feather details, with the beak and eye profile visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid red-orange head and body with a gradient to yellow underparts, and solid dark gray-black wings and tail.
